homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Dependable Plumbing in San Jose
aboutText: Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors. For over a decade, we've been building a reputation for quality workmanship and unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our team approaches every project with meticulous attention to detail, using proven techniques and durable materials to ensure long-lasting results. We're not just fixing pipes; we're building trust.

As a local business, we're deeply invested in the San Jose community. We support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact. When you choose Plumbing & Drainage Pros, you're supporting a business that cares.

services.name: Drain Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Fast and effective drain cleaning to keep your plumbing flowing freely.
services.description:
Clogged drains are a common nuisance, especially in older San Jose homes with aging pipes. Hair, grease, and mineral buildup can restrict water flow, leading to slow drainage, unpleasant odors, and even backups. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose offers comprehensive drain cleaning services to eliminate clogs and restore optimal drainage.

Our experienced technicians use a variety of methods to tackle even the toughest blockages. We utilize professional-grade snakes and hydro-jetting equipment to clear drains quickly and efficiently. Hydro-jetting uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn buildup, leaving your pipes clean and clear. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help keep your drains flowing smoothly.

Whether you're dealing with a slow-draining sink, a clogged shower, or a backed-up sewer line, Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose has the expertise and equipment to solve your drain problems. We'll diagnose the issue, explain your options, and provide a lasting solution.
process: Step 1: Assessment of the drain blockage using camera inspection if needed.
Step 2: Selection of the appropriate drain cleaning method (snake, hydro-jetting, etc.).
Step 3: Thorough cleaning of the drain to remove all debris and buildup.
Step 4: Testing the drain to ensure proper flow and function.

faq.question: How often should I have my drains cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend having your drains cleaned at least once a year to prevent buildup and blockages. Homes with older plumbing or frequent use may require more frequent cleaning.

faq.question: What is hydro-jetting?
faq.answer: Hydro-jetting is a drain cleaning method that uses high-pressure water to blast away stubborn buildup and debris from the inside of your pipes. It's a highly effective way to clear even the toughest clogs.

faq.question: Is drain cleaner safe to use?
faq.answer: While drain cleaner can sometimes clear minor clogs, it can also damage your pipes and pose a safety hazard. We recommend avoiding drain cleaner and calling a professional plumber instead.

services.name: Water Heater Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Reliable repairs and efficient installations for all types of water heaters.
services.description:
A malfunctioning water heater can disrupt your daily routine, especially during San Jose's cooler months. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose specializes in the repair and installation of all types of water heaters, including traditional tank water heaters, tankless water heaters, and heat pump water heaters.

Our experienced technicians can diagnose and repair a wide range of water heater problems, from leaks and strange noises to inconsistent water temperatures. We use only high-quality replacement parts to ensure lasting repairs. If your water heater is beyond repair, we can help you choose a new, energy-efficient model that meets your needs and budget.

We handle the entire installation process, from removing your old water heater to connecting the new one and ensuring it's functioning properly. We'll also explain how to operate and maintain your new water heater to maximize its lifespan. With San Jose's varied housing stock, we've seen it all and can handle any water heater challenge.
process: Step 1: Diagnosis of the water heater problem.
Step 2: Repair or replacement of faulty parts.
Step 3: Installation of new water heaters, including proper venting and connections.
Step 4: Testing and ensuring proper operation of the water heater.
benefits: Extends the lifespan of your water heater

faq.question: How long does a water heater typically last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of a water heater depends on the type and quality, but most last between 8 and 12 years. Regular maintenance can help extend its lifespan.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a tankless water heater?
faq.answer: Tankless water heaters provide on-demand hot water, eliminate standby heat loss, and can save you money on your energy bills. They also take up less space than traditional tank water heaters.

faq.question: How do I know if my water heater needs to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your water heater may need to be replaced include frequent leaks, rusty water, strange noises, and inconsistent water temperatures.

services.name: Leak Detection
services.shortDescription: Advanced leak detection services to protect your home from water damage.
services.description:
Hidden water leaks can cause significant damage to your home, leading to mold growth, structural problems, and high water bills. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose utilizes advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint the source of leaks quickly and accurately.

Our experienced technicians use non-invasive methods such as acoustic listening devices and thermal imaging cameras to detect leaks behind walls, under floors, and in underground pipes. We can identify even the smallest leaks before they cause major damage. Once we've located the leak, we'll provide you with a detailed report and recommend the best course of action for repair.

Protect your San Jose home from the costly effects of water damage. Contact Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose for professional leak detection services. With the area prone to earthquakes, it is best to ensure there are no hidden leaks.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive inspection of your plumbing system.
Step 2: Use of advanced leak detection technology to pinpoint the source of leaks.
Step 3: Detailed report outlining the location and severity of the leak.
Step 4: Recommendations for repair and prevention.

faq.question: What are the signs of a hidden water leak?
faq.answer: Signs of a hidden water leak include unexplained increases in your water bill, damp spots on walls or ceilings, mold growth, and the sound of running water when no fixtures are in use.

faq.question: How much does leak detection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of leak detection varies depending on the size and complexity of the job. We provide free estimates before any work begins.

faq.question: Can I detect a leak myself?
faq.answer: While you can check for obvious leaks, hidden leaks require professional equipment and expertise to locate accurately.

services.name: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert pipe repair and replacement services for lasting plumbing solutions.
services.description:
Leaky, corroded, or damaged pipes can compromise the integrity of your plumbing system. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose offers comprehensive pipe repair and replacement services to ensure the reliable flow of water throughout your home.

Our experienced technicians can repair or replace all types of pipes, including copper, PVC, and PEX. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs. Whether you're dealing with a small leak or a major pipe burst, we have the expertise and equipment to handle the job quickly and efficiently. Given the older housing stock around Willow Glen and Rose Garden neighborhoods, we're very familiar with aging pipe issues.

We also offer pipe rerouting services to improve water pressure or avoid obstacles. Contact Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose for reliable pipe repair and replacement services.
process: Step 1: Assessment of the pipe damage.
Step 2: Selection of the appropriate repair or replacement method.
Step 3: Repair or replacement of damaged pipes.
Step 4: Testing to ensure proper flow and function.

faq.question: How do I know if my pipes need to be replaced?
faq.answer: Signs that your pipes may need to be replaced include frequent leaks, rusty water, low water pressure, and visible corrosion.

faq.question: What are the different types of pipes?
faq.answer: Common types of pipes include copper, PVC, and PEX. Each type has its own advantages and disadvantages.

faq.question: How much does pipe repair or replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of pipe repair or replacement varies depending on the extent of the damage and the type of pipe. We provide free estimates before any work begins.

services.name: Sewer Line Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive sewer line repair, replacement, and cleaning.
services.description:
Problems with your sewer line can lead to unpleasant odors, backups, and even property damage. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose offers comprehensive sewer line services to keep your wastewater flowing smoothly.

Our experienced technicians use advanced equipment to diagnose and repair sewer line problems. We offer trenchless sewer repair methods, which minimize disruption to your property. We also provide sewer line cleaning services to remove blockages and prevent future problems. Sewer lines in San Jose can be affected by tree roots due to the mild climate and established landscaping.

Whether you're dealing with a clogged sewer line, a broken pipe, or a root intrusion, Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose has the expertise and equipment to solve your sewer line problems. We'll diagnose the issue, explain your options, and provide a lasting solution.
process: Step 1: Sewer line inspection using camera technology.
Step 2: Diagnosis of the sewer line problem.
Step 3: Selection of the appropriate repair or replacement method.
Step 4: Repair or replacement of damaged sewer lines.

faq.question: What are the signs of a sewer line problem?
faq.answer: Signs of a sewer line problem include frequent backups, slow drains, unpleasant odors, and gurgling sounds in your plumbing.

faq.question: What is trenchless sewer repair?
faq.answer: Trenchless sewer repair is a method of repairing or replacing sewer lines without digging a large trench. It minimizes disruption to your property and is often faster and more cost-effective than traditional methods.

faq.question: How much does sewer line repair or replacement cost?
faq.answer: The cost of sewer line repair or replacement varies depending on the extent of the damage and the method used. We provide free estimates before any work begins.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of faucets, sinks, toilets, and other plumbing fixtures.
services.description:
Upgrading your plumbing fixtures can enhance the look and functionality of your kitchen and bathrooms. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose offers professional fixture installation services for faucets, sinks, toilets, showers, and more.

Our experienced technicians can install all types of fixtures, from basic models to high-end designer options. We ensure proper installation and connection to prevent leaks and ensure optimal performance. Whether you're remodeling your bathroom or simply replacing a worn-out faucet, we can help you choose the right fixtures and install them with precision.

We're familiar with the styles popular in San Jose neighborhoods, from modern updates in newer construction to classic renovations in established homes. Contact Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose for professional fixture installation services.
process: Step 1: Removal of the old fixture.
Step 2: Preparation of the installation area.
Step 3: Installation of the new fixture.
Step 4: Testing to ensure proper function and leak prevention.
benefits: Enhances the look of your home

faq.question: How do I choose the right plumbing fixtures?
faq.answer: Consider your budget, style preferences, and functional needs when choosing plumbing fixtures. We can provide recommendations based on your specific requirements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to install new plumbing fixtures?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the scope of the project. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How much does fixture installation cost?
faq.answer: The cost of fixture installation varies depending on the type of fixture and the complexity of the job. We provide free estimates before any work begins.

serviceAreas.content:
Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose is proud to offer comprehensive plumbing services to the residents and businesses of San Jose, California. From Alum Rock to Willow Glen, and downtown to the foothills, our expert plumbers are ready to tackle any plumbing challenge, big or small. We understand the unique plumbing needs of San Jose, considering the age of many homes and the specific demands of the local climate. Whether it's a leaky faucet, a clogged drain, a water heater replacement, or a complex sewer line repair, we're committed to providing prompt, reliable, and affordable service. 

We’re dedicated to ensuring the plumbing systems in San Jose function flawlessly. Our services include drain cleaning, leak detection, water heater repair and installation, sewer line services, and much more. We use state-of-the-art equipment and techniques to diagnose and resolve plumbing issues efficiently and effectively. We are a local company committed to serving our community, and our reputation is built on trust, integrity, and quality workmanship. We always strive to exceed your expectations.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Our kitchen sink was completely clogged, and I couldn't even wash dishes. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose came out the same day and cleared the drain quickly. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: My water heater started leaking, and I was worried about water damage. They responded quickly and were able to repair the leak. They were honest about the cost and didn't try to upsell me on a new water heater. Good service!

reviews.name: Lisa M.
reviews.text: We had a major sewer backup in our backyard, and it was a nightmare. Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose came out and cleared the sewer line quickly and efficiently. They were very professional and cleaned up everything afterward. I'm so relieved!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: I had a leaky pipe in my basement, and they fixed it quickly and professionally. The plumber was very knowledgeable and explained the problem clearly. I'm very happy with the service.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: I had a new toilet installed by Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose. They were on time, efficient, and cleaned up after themselves. The new toilet works great! Only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is because the scheduling process was a bit confusing.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.text: I suspected a leak in my water line and called Plumbing & Drainage Pros San Jose. They used advanced equipment to locate the leak quickly and accurately. The repair was done efficiently, and I'm grateful for their expertise.
